rationale.root_cause: The response did not mention src/be_parser.c:1420 or the class_inherit logic; it instead discussed an unrelated premature exit issue. Therefore it failed to diagnose the actual defect site.
rationale.local_fix: No code change was proposed at the correct file/site; the suggested edits about exit/return are unrelated to be_parser.c:1420 and do not match the required patch.
rationale.global_fix: There was no explanation of why passing e directly to be_code_setsuper mutates the original class and why working on a copy is needed; the reasoning focused on program termination instead.
